title: Exodus TFC
description: an all-around immersive survival pack based around TerraFirmaCraft and its addons
body:
**For those who want a true Wilderness experience...**\
Exodus TFC is a pack based around TerraFirmaCraft, a mod that set out to "reinvent survival mode" while also adding optimization mods and addons for an all-around realistic world (don't worry, this isn't RLcraft!)

- **Spawn in an Overhauled world,** with new flora, fauna, and even climate!
- **Thrive off the earth's resources** from humble straw and lumber to the cusp of the Industrial age
- **A more dangerous night** with visibility based on the moon and more battlehardy mobs
- **Immersive mechanics** from thirst and weight to new gear and combat
- **An in-game guide** with your first steps right in your inventory!
- **Voicechat and VR support** so you dont have to tread the wilderness alone
...And of course, more!  To be quite honest I mostly made this for myself to experience TFC personally, but I'm quite pleased of how this pack turned out.  Enjoy!

<details>
<summary>for Server Owners</summary>

In server.properties, ensure the worldtype is set to "tfc\\:overworld", otherwise you'll end up in a vanilla world with very broken mechanics.
  
I'd also highly recommend setting the difficulty to Hard, this ensures monsters spawn with the new gear.


Make sure not only the mods are present, but that you add the configs, defaultconfigs, and scripts folders and their contents to the srver BEFORE RUNNING THE SERVER so the modpack is configured properly. 
 
I would also recommend removing Embeddium, Flerovium, Oculus, RyoamicLights, True Darkness, CIT Resewn, Splasher, DynamicFPS, ImmediatelyFast, Fast Ip Ping, Logical Zoom, Make Bubbles Pop, Remove Reloading Screen, and Toast Begone, as these are client-side mods and will crash the server.

If you arent finding any animals on servers during testing, remove Respawning Animals.  I'm not sure why it works so well in singleplayer and pretty badly in multiplayer.
 
If you like, you can also use Chunky to pregenerate chunks for your server.  more information on that [here](https://modrinth.com/plugin/chunky).
</details>

<details>
<summary>Credits</summary>
I'd like to thank these mods for being under the MIT license so I could add them despite not being on Modrinth.  I've decided to do the same for this pack! 
 
[Spindles TFC](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spindles-tfc/files/6496727) 
 
[TFC Punishment for Death](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tfc-punishment-for-death/files/6613067) 
 
An additional thanks to the [Hardrock 3](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/terrafirmacraft-hardrock) and [TerraFirmaGreg](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/terrafirmagreg-modern) packs, without their modlists Exodus likely wouldn't have gone as far as it has.

Thanks for the icon art, Ori
</details>
